cleavage agent: Digestion of dCW with trypsin abrogated the response of D160 1–23
enrichment method: we enriched for glycopeptides present in the native MPT32 pronase digest using a Concavalin-A (ConA) lectin column
fractionation method: Reverse phase HPLC fractionation of pronase-digested dCW successfully isolated biological activity
instrument: samples were eluted into a LTQ linear ion trap mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 1 mM DTT for 30 min to reduce the proteins
reduction concentration: 1 mM DTT for 30 min to reduce the proteins
